# Copilot Overlay

This file defines Copilot-specific behavior on top of the shared base policy.

## Inherits

- `../base-policy.md`
- `../release-policy.md`

## Copilot-Specific Guidance

- Keep instruction files concise and link to canonical policy documents.
- Preserve compatibility with GitHub workflow-triggered custom agents.
- Prefer issue-linked PR descriptions using `Closes #<issue>` when applicable.
